response.justification: Bogdan brings 27 years of deep software engineering expertise with proven ability to architect complex systems and lead technical initiatives. However, the role requires demonstrated AI strategy expertise and recognized standing in AI, which the resume shows only recently through infrastructure tooling work at re:cinq. While his full-stack capabilities and founder experience are strengths, the gap in demonstrated AI strategic leadership and lack of advanced AI credentials are significant concerns for this principal-level AI strategy position.
strengths: 27+ years of full-stack software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure with proven ability to architect and scale systems at scale
Founder of GISCollective open-source platform and creator of multiple successful libraries, demonstrating product vision and entrepreneurial leadership
Deep technical breadth in cloud technologies (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) and demonstrated ability to rapidly learn and master new technical domains
concerns: AI/ML expertise appears recent and primarily infrastructure-focused (MCP, agent frameworks) rather than strategic AI product development or innovation leadership
No advanced degree in AI-related field and no evidence of recognized standing, publications, or advisory influence in the AI community
Resume lacks clear evidence of director-level strategic influence, external advisory roles, or driving organizational AI differentiation or technology adoption strategies

key_factors.factor: Demonstrated AI Strategy and Product Leadership
Total Experience Depth and Technical Breadth
Entrepreneurial Background and System Architecture Track Record
